message:
fix(ci): update macOS runners in release workflow

- Replace deprecated macos-13 with macos-15-intel for x86_64 builds
- Replace macos-14 with macos-15 for aarch64 builds
- macos-13 is no longer supported by GitHub Actions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -110,11 +110,11 @@ jobs:
             artifact_name: pt-core-linux-aarch64-musl
             is_musl: true
           # macOS builds
-          - os: macos-13
+          - os: macos-15-intel
             target: x86_64-apple-darwin
             artifact_name: pt-core-macos-x86_64
             is_musl: false
-          - os: macos-14
+          - os: macos-15
             target: aarch64-apple-darwin
             artifact_name: pt-core-macos-aarch64
             is_musl: false
